Discovering new drugs that can inhibit viral replication would be useful for combatting the virus. One method is to screen a library of small molecule drugs for inhibition in an infected cell-based assay.

(A) does not inhibit SARS-CoV-2 replication (B) inhibits SARS-CoV-2 replication
